summary: Gap analysis comparing Kaggle S6E2 top solutions against KillShot v3.2. Identifies 10 missing techniques: Target Encoding (P0), Thallium×ChestPain interaction (P0), Health_score (P0), RFE feature selection (P1), OHE for pseudo-categoricals (P1), Yeo-Johnson (P1), Hill Climbing ensemble (P2), pseudo-labeling (P2), multi-seed (P2), and clinical risk scores (P2). Provides 3-iteration improvement plan with expected AUC gains from 0.955 to 0.964.
